upload.title: Upload XML Configuration
upload.cardDesc: Upload a previously exported .xml configuration file.

ssh.title: SSH Connection
ssh.cardDesc: Connect to Firebox device via SSH and automatically retrieve configuration.

RULE-001.name: Default Password Check
RULE-001.descPass: All administrator passwords have been changed from factory defaults.
RULE-001.descFail: Accounts using default passwords detected: {{details}}. This poses unauthorized access risk to your device.
RULE-001.remediation: Change the admin and status account passwords to strong, unique passwords via Firebox System Manager or Web UI.

RULE-002.name: Management Interface Exposure
RULE-002.descPass: Management interfaces are not accessible from external networks.
RULE-002.descFail: Management policies exposed to external networks: {{details}}. Attackers can access your device's management panel over the internet.
RULE-002.remediation: Remove 'Any-External' from the 'From' field of WatchGuard and WatchGuard Web UI policies. Restrict management access to trusted internal IPs only.

RULE-003.name: Outgoing Traffic Policy
RULE-003.descPass: Default 'Outgoing' policy is disabled or removed.
RULE-003.descFail: The 'Outgoing' policy is active. This policy allows all TCP/UDP traffic from internal to external networks, opening the door to data exfiltration and malware communication.
RULE-003.remediation: Disable the default 'Outgoing' policy and create specific rules allowing only necessary ports/protocols (HTTP, HTTPS, DNS, etc.).

RULE-004.name: Security Services Status
RULE-004.descPass: Gateway AV, IPS, WebBlocker, and APT Blocker services are active.
RULE-004.descFail: Disabled security services: {{details}}. Without these services, your device is unprotected against malware, attacks, and dangerous websites.
RULE-004.remediation: Enable Gateway AntiVirus, IPS, WebBlocker, and APT Blocker from Firebox System Manager > Subscription Services. Check your license status.

RULE-005.name: Policy Logging Check
RULE-005.descPass: Logging is enabled on all policies.
RULE-005.descFail: Policies with logging disabled: {{details}}. Without logs, detecting security events and performing forensic analysis becomes impossible.
RULE-005.remediation: Edit each policy in Policy Manager and enable 'Send a log message' and 'Send a log message for reports' under Properties > Logging.
